Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Ccsf To Produce Carla Honson For Deposition And To Produce Records And Files Requested In Subpoena; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Ramiro Castro, appeared for plaintiff/moving party
Monica Wiley, appeared for defendant CCSF

Ruling:
Argued. Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Defendant City and County of San Francisco To Produce Carla Johnson For Deposition and To Produce The Records and Files Requested In The Subpoena is denied. Plaintiff cannot designate a person most knowledgeable. While there may be discovery that may be obtained on the issues sought by Plaintiff, it cannot be obtained by this procedure. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
